reviews.review_description: This is like a garbage tossing; aim and just pull the trigger. No archery like actions.
The app is stuck in install mode.

A couple of suggestions: 
* A draw mechanism would be cool, perhaps slide or hold down the thumb pad to give a variable draw. 
* Optional left or right handed bow (or is that already set to controller position?)
* Earn better bows, from recurve to various compound bow strengths for flatter trajectories.
* Earn various sights, from a set of fixed pins, to an adjustable pin, scopes, eventually a holographic heads up display.
*Earn various balance poles and devices to steady aiming.

I’m a serious archer and own all that good stuff in RL (real life), be fun to have it available in VR! 
🤟🏼🤠🏹
I've just bought this title for 8p. What's not to like about it.

I enjoy this app very much. On the Oculus Go, quick and easy to use, like an arcade game, but pleasing and relaxing. Well worth the money.
I would like to see a much more sophisticated version of this theme, would go down well with archery enthusiasts.
Well done.

Not cool.  Just a trigger with no pull...a funky way to TRY to aim...off center stance, and no advanced options for things like wind or height.  If this were Amazon, I would have sent it back without being charged for shipping.   Decent graphics though.

developer_response.body: In July, we updated. We added 70 m with wind. I want to gradually make it good.

reviews.review_description:
I really wanted to enjoy this game. I really did. As a relaxing game, some tactics, some practise and some competition, career maybe. 

Alas, it’s not there. The atmosphere is nice and quiet, but I can’t find a proper way to aim, or control my shots for that matter. There is not much else except the choice for static targets to shoot at. The text messages you will get are asian/european mixed which seems sloppy. All in all I didn’t find what I hoped for. Not much fun, little, poor mechanics, ni replayability value. Deinstalled for now. Perhaps will  give it a retry after a substantial update.
